docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO NOV-16-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-16-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-16-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-16-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT CARRIE BONFITTO WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. DEFENDANT KEN CUENO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,094.00 FILED BY KURODA, GENKI AS TO DEFENDANT CUNEO, KEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF GENKI KURODA RE: AMENDING CLAIM AND RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF KURODA, GENKI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $65.95 SERVED SEP-25-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BONFITTO, CARRIE
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF KURODA, GENKI
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,094.00 FILED BY KURODA, GENKI AS TO DEFENDANT CUNEO, KEN BONFITTO, CARRIE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KURODA, GENKI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CUNEO, KEN BONFITTO, CARRIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
